page_metadata.biotools__summary: CAMAMED is a pipeline for composition-aware mapping-based analysis of metagenomic data. This pipeline can analyze metagenomic samples at both taxonomic and functional profiling levels.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: CAMAMED is a pipeline for composition-aware mapping-based analysis of metagenomic data. This pipeline can analyze metagenomic samples at both taxonomic and functional profiling levels.
